Categories.value: GFDL|Taken with Canon Digital IXUS 105|License migration redundant|Self-published work|Photos by User:BrokenSphere|2010 National League Division Series - San Francisco Giants vs. Atlanta Braves Game 2

ImageDescription.value: Game 2 of the National League Division Series between the Atlanta Braves and the San Francisco Giants at AT&T Park. The Braves won 5-4 in extra innings.
